case_title: UNITY HOMES, INC. VS. MATHEW CALLOWAY ET AL

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM UD COURT TRIAL CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-09-2016 - CASE SETTLED PER PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SAUL FERSTER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
